items.headline: How SpaceX and 'MANGOS' are fueling the latest ETF trends
items.summary: AllianceBernstein Global head of ETF strategy and partnerships, Julie Gunts, joins Yahoo Finance to explain how "MANGOS" stocks — Meta (META), Amazon (AMZN), Nvidia (NVDA), Alphabet (GOOG, GOOGL), OpenAI (OPAI.PVT), and SpaceX (SPCX) — are ushering in the latest trends in exchange-traded funds (ETFs).

items.headline: Forget SpaceX. Alphabet Just Beat Earnings by 94% and Doubled Its Cloud Backlog to $460 Billion
items.summary: SpaceX (NASDAQ:SPCX) is the ticker dominating every group chat this week, with the private-company exposure vehicle gaining 19.18% in five trading days on pure rocket-launch euphoria. items.headline: Tim Cook Says Apple Is About to Get Swamped By a “100-Year Flood”
items.summary: The artificial intelligence boom is reshaping more than just software. It is rewriting the economics of the entire technology industry. The four largest hyperscalers — Amazon (NASDAQ:AMZN), Microsoft (NASDAQ:MSFT), Alphabet (NASDAQ:GOOG), and Meta Platforms (NASDAQ:META) — are expected to spend roughly $750 billion on AI infrastructure in 2026. That spending spree is consuming enormous amounts ... Tim Cook Says Apple Is About to Get Swamped By a “100-Year Flood”

items.headline: The Number That Puts Oracle Stock To The Test
items.summary: For an investor in Oracle (ORCL), the headlines are dizzying. The company is signing AI infrastructure contracts by the tens of billions and has built a backlog of future business that seems to defy gravity. Yet the stock has been under pressure, down 12.2% over the past year, suggesting the market sees more to the story.
